title: Bring Asset Data Back - Infoblox NIOS
content:
This playbook brings asset data from XSOAR to Infoblox by creating the host record using the Infoblox NIOS integration.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Infoblox Inc. pack (Infoblox, partner-supported).

Use cases: Network Security.

Inputs — name: The name of the host record.; ipv4_addresses: The IPv4 addresses to create host record with. Example: [{"ipv4addr": "192.168.1.0"}], [{"ipv4addr": "192.168.1.1", "configure_for_dhcp": true}].; ipv6_addresses: The IPv6 addresses to create host record with. Example: [{"ipv6addr": "2001:db8::1"}], [{"ipv6addr": "2001:db8::2", "configure_for_dhcp": true}].; view: The DNS view in which the records are located.; comment: The comment for this host record.; configure_for_dns: Boolean value to decide whether to configure the host record for DNS. Default is True..

Integrations/scripts used: infoblox-create-host-record.

description: This playbook brings asset data from XSOAR to Infoblox by creating the host record using the Infoblox NIOS integration.
